title: borbonia humilis
intro: Borbonia humilis, also known as the Dwarf Silverbell or Silverbell, is a perennial plant species native to the southeastern United States. It possesses medicinal properties, primarily attributed to its roots and stems, which contain compounds such as alkaloids and flavonoids. These compounds have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, offering benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Borbonia humilis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote overall health and well-being.
